title: Human-AI interactive framework for smart evacuation safety analysis in large infrastructures
contribution: 实现智能化疏散安全评估和优化指导
pdfFile: Lu et al. - 2026 - Human-AI interactive framework for smart evacuation safety analysis in large infrastructures.pdf
markdownFile: Lu et al. - 2026 - Human-AI interactive framework for smart evacuation safety analysis in large infrastructures.md
abstract: This study develops an Intelligent Evacuation Prediction Tool (IEPTool) that integrates deep learning (CNN, LSTM-Attention, Pix2Pix GAN) with a large language model for interactive evacuation prediction and safety assessment in large infrastructures. Trained on a simulation database of 66 real architectural floor plans across six infrastructure types, the tool predicts evacuation time, exit flow rates, and dynamic pedestrian density with over 90% accuracy, while the integrated LLM provides intelligent risk analysis and optimization guidance through natural language interaction.
methodology: The framework integrates CNN-based feature extraction, LSTM-Attention networks for exit flow sequence prediction, and Pix2Pix GAN for dynamic density heatmap generation, trained on a Pathfinder simulation database of 66 real floor plans from six large infrastructure types with rotational data augmentation; an LLM is incorporated via system prompts for interactive risk analysis and optimization guidance through a seven-step GUI workflow.
results: The CNN module achieved R-squared of 99% for evacuation time prediction with testing tolerance of [-2.34%, +2.57%]; the LSTM-Attention module reached R-squared of 98% for flow sequences with tolerance of [-4.48%, +4.66%]; and the GAN-based density module achieved prediction error of [-10.24%, +9.76%], all substantially outperforming prior methods whose errors range from 6.5% to over 36%.
